title: aira elegans subsp. notarisiana
intro: Aira elegans subsp. notarisiana is a subspecies of grass known by the common name of Notaris's hair grass. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aira elegans subsp. notarisiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
